entries.title: Legends Is Not Disney Canon Blend

content.fact: This deck targets Star Wars Legends / Expanded Universe continuity and should not silently import Disney-canon-only events, characters, politics, or sequel outcomes.
content.injection: When this Legends deck is active, do not blend in Disney-canon-only lore unless another loaded deck or the user’s story explicitly introduces it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Broad Star Wars Legends continuity.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development draft; verify during Saga review.

continuity.sourceBoundary: Broad Star Wars Legends continuity scaffold; intended to be stacked under narrower era/source decks.

entries.title: No Sequel Trilogy Default in Legends

content.fact: Sequel-trilogy events, First Order politics, Rey-era Jedi material, and Disney post-Endor outcomes are not the default path for Legends decks.
content.injection: Do not route post-Endor Legends toward the First Order or sequel trilogy unless a Disney canon or crossover deck is explicitly loaded.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Broad Star Wars Legends continuity.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development draft; verify during Saga review.

entries.title: No Casual World Between Worlds in Legends Core

content.fact: World Between Worlds material is not a default Legends-core mechanism for solving continuity, time travel, or character survival.
content.injection: Do not use World Between Worlds or Disney-canon metaphysics in Legends-core scenes unless a specific crossover or canon deck introduces them.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Broad Star Wars Legends continuity.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development draft; verify during Saga review.

content.fact: Darth Vader’s identity as Anakin Skywalker and Luke’s father is not ordinary knowledge before the relevant story reveal.
content.injection: Before the Empire/Bespin reveal context, do not let ordinary characters casually know Vader is Anakin or Luke’s father unless the story established special knowledge. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Rebel Alliance before Endor.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development draft; verify during Saga review.

content.fact: Leia’s deeper Jedi training and later Force development belong to post-Endor Legends, not ordinary pre-Endor roleplay baseline.
content.injection: Before Endor, keep Leia primarily as Rebel leader/princess/senator figure unless the story explicitly introduces early Force training or divergence. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Rebel Alliance before Endor.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.

entries.title: Palpatine Clone Material Is Post-Endor Only

content.fact: Dark Empire-style Palpatine clone and reborn Emperor material belongs after Endor in Legends and should not leak into earlier eras by default.
content.injection: Before post-Endor Dark Empire context, do not foreshadow or reveal Palpatine clone survival unless a deck/source window explicitly calls for it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Post-Endor New Republic Legends.
Respect story-position bounds from Episode VI: Return of the Jedi to New Jedi Order Era.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development draft; verify during Saga review.

content.fact: Grand Admiral Thrawn is a major post-Endor Legends anchor, not an ordinary original-trilogy public antagonist by default.
content.injection: Do not insert Thrawn into ordinary OT-era scenes unless a narrower source deck or user premise places him there. Use him as a post-Endor/Unknown Regions anchor by default.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Post-Endor New Republic Legends.
Respect story-position bounds from Episode VI: Return of the Jedi to New Jedi Order Era.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.

content.fact: Mara Jade is a major Legends character, but her role as Emperor’s Hand, Luke’s later ally, Jedi, and spouse is source- and post-Endor-specific.
content.injection: Do not leak Mara Jade’s full arc or relationship outcomes before the appropriate post-Endor source window unless the user’s story introduces her early.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Post-Endor New Republic Legends.
Respect story-position bounds from Episode VI: Return of the Jedi to New Jedi Order Era.

context.label: New Jedi Order and later Legends

content.fact: The Yuuzhan Vong War is not public galactic context before the New Jedi Order era.
content.injection: Before NJO, do not have ordinary characters know the Yuuzhan Vong invasion, biology, or threat framework unless the scene uses specific advance-scout material.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order and later Legends.
Respect story-position bounds from New Jedi Order Era to Far-Future Legends Backdrop.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development draft; verify during Saga review.

entries.title: Game Mechanics Are Not Default Lore

content.fact: Video-game mechanics such as cooldowns, hit points, loot tiers, class balance, and player UI are not default diegetic lore unless the active deck is mechanics-focused.
content.injection: Do not translate Star Wars game mechanics directly into story facts. Use in-universe abilities, technology, training, resources, and consequences instead.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Broad Star Wars Legends continuity.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
antiLore: Do not treat later-era, alternate-continuity, or fanon facts as true in this Context unless the user explicitly selected that branch.
content.notes: Generated development draft; verify during Saga review.

content.fact: Common fanon, crossover assumptions, memes, and roleplay defaults are not Legends canon unless the user’s story or a custom deck introduces them.
content.injection: Treat fanon as opt-in. Do not inject popular fandom assumptions as canon without a custom, AU, or user-story basis.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Broad Star Wars Legends continuity.
